raw_consumer_statement: I filed a fraud claim with Macys/Citibank for unauthorized charges on my account ending in XXXX. Despite my timely report, they denied my claim and stated I was responsible for the charges, even though I did not authorize or benefit from them. They re-billed my account and threatened to report me as past due to the credit bureaus. This is a violation of the Fair Credit Billing Act ( FCBA ), which limits my liability for unauthorized use. I am requesting that the CFPB investigate, ensure my account is corrected, and prevent Macys/Citibank from reporting inaccurate information to credit bureaus.
